ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Region identifier for the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the region data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the variable */,
  "measure_code" TEXT /* Measure code for the variable */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "measure_note" TEXT /* Detailed note about the measure */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the variable */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the variable */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the variable data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the variable data was updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or rating for the variable data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_measure_code FOREIGN KEY ("measure_code") REFERENCES measures ("measure_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "measure_note" TEXT /* Detailed note about the measure */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the measure data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the measure data was updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or rating for the measure data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the data point */,
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Variable code for the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the data point was updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or rating for the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_code FOREIGN KEY ("variable_code") REFERENCES variables ("variable_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date when the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date when the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Variable code for the metadata */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the metadata entry was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_metadata_variable_code FOREIGN KEY ("variable_code") REFERENCES variables ("variable_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the metadata */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the metadata entry was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_metadata_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)
